case_title: TATYANA YURIYCHUK VS. RCI FINANCIAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YURIYCHUK, TATYANA AS TO DEFENDANT RCI FINANCIAL CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RCI FINANCIAL CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEF/ RETURN UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YURIYCHUK, TATYANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RCI FINANCIAL CORPORATION THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH A FAILURE TO PERFORM BY DEFENDANT RCI FINANCIAL. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST OTHER RESPONSIBLE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
